title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Compare the photographs and answer the questions.

tasks.instructions: Compare two of the pictures, and say what the people might find attractive about living in these places and what the drawbacks might be.

images.label: A
images.description: A futuristic cityscape with skyscrapers and busy multi-level traffic systems.

images.label: B
images.description: A historic European street with cobblestones, old architecture, and small cafes.

images.label: C
images.description: A quiet residential suburb with detached houses and wide, empty roads.

followUp.question: Which of these places would you prefer to live in? (Why?)

tasks.instructions: Compare two of the pictures, and say what the people are learning about the past and why they might have chosen that method.

images.label: D
images.description: A group of tourists listening to a guide at an ancient archaeological site or ruins.

images.label: E
images.description: A person using a virtual reality headset to experience a historical event in 3D.

images.label: F
images.description: A researcher looking at old, delicate manuscripts in a quiet library archive.

followUp.question: Which method of learning about history do you think is most effective? (Why?)
